block.header: aki tu mi kamwi to opo ya sima sira si myesu yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto mikwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,3@命親王諸王諸臣百官人等天下公民衆聞宣,*

sentence.transcription: aki tu mi kamwi to
opo ya sima sira si myesu
yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 命親王諸王諸臣百官人等天下公民衆聞宣
sentence.transcription: opo mikoto mikwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: kake maku mo kasikwo ki pudipara no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto pinoto no tori no tosi no pa dukwi ni ko no wosu kuni ame no sita no waza wo pi name si no mi kwo no mikoto no mukapi mye bara no mi kwo ima ame no sita sira si myesi turu sumyera mikoto ni saduke tamapite narabi imasi ko no ame no sita wo wosame tama pi totonope tamapi ki

comment.raw: IP-MAT,NP,2@倭根子天皇丁酉八月尓,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,3@此食国天下之業乎日並所知皇太子之嫡子今御宇豆留,*
IP-MAT,5@此天下乎治賜比諧賜岐,*

sentence.transcription: kake maku mo kasikwo ki
pudipara no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si

sentence.kanji: 倭根子天皇丁酉八月尓
sentence.transcription: yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto pinoto no tori no tosi no pa dukwi ni

sentence.kanji: 此食国天下之業乎日並所知皇太子之嫡子今御宇豆留
sentence.transcription: ko no wosu kuni ame no sita no waza wo pi name si no mi kwo no mikoto no mukapi mye bara no mi kwo ima ame no sita sira si myesi turu
sumyera mikoto ni saduke tamapite narabi imasi

sentence.kanji: 此天下乎治賜比諧賜岐
sentence.transcription: ko no ame no sita wo wosame tama pi totonope tamapi ki

block.header: ko pa kakemaku mo kasikwo ki apumi no opo tu no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto no ame tuti to tomo ni naga ku pi tukwi to tomo ni topo ku aratamu masizi ki tune no nori to tate tama pi siki tama p yeru nori wo uke tamapari masite okonapi tamapu koto to moro moro uke tamaparite kasikwo mi tukape ma turi turaku to noritamapu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,PP-GEN,NP,2@大倭根子天皇乃与天地共長,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,8@衆受被賜而恐美仕奉利豆羅久止詔,*

sentence.transcription: ko pa kakemaku mo kasikwo ki
apumi no opo tu no miya ni ame no sita sira si myesi si

sentence.kanji: 大倭根子天皇乃与天地共長
sentence.transcription: yamato ne kwo sumyera mikoto no ame tuti to tomo ni naga ku
pi tukwi to tomo ni topo ku
aratamu masizi ki

sentence.kanji: 常典止立賜比敷賜覇留
sentence.transcription: tune no nori to tate tama pi siki tama p yeru
nori wo uke tamapari masite okonapi tamapu
koto to

sentence.kanji: 衆受被賜而恐美仕奉利豆羅久止詔
sentence.transcription: moro moro uke tamaparite kasikwo mi tukape ma turi turaku to noritamapu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: kaku tukape maturi paberu ni kozo no simo tukwi ni kasikwo ki kamo wa ga opo kimi wa ga kwo sumyera mikoto no nori tamapi turaku ware mi mwi tukarasi ku imasu ga yuwe ni itwoma ete mi yamapi wosame tamapa mu to su ko no ama tu pi tugi no kurawi pa opo mikoto ni ima se opomasimasite wosame tamapu be si to yuduri tamapu opo mikoto wo uke tamapari masite kotape mawosi turaku ware pa tapezi to inabwi mawosite uke masa zu aru apida ni tabi mane ku pi kasanete yuduri tama peba itapasi mi kasikwo mi kotosi no mina dukwi no towo ka amari itu ka no pi ni opo mikoto pa uke tamapu to mawosi nagara ko no ikasi kurawi ni tugi masu koto wo namo ame tuti no kokoro wo itapasi mi ikasi mi kasikwomi ma saku to noritamapu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-MAT,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-MAT,8@此乃天豆日嗣之位者大命尓坐世大坐坐而,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,20@事呼奈良母天地心呼労美重美畏坐左久止詔,*

sentence.transcription: kaku tukape maturi paberu ni
kozo no simo tukwi ni
kasikwo ki kamo

sentence.kanji: 我王朕子天皇乃詔豆羅久
sentence.transcription: wa ga opo kimi wa ga kwo sumyera mikoto no nori tamapi turaku
ware mi mwi tukarasi ku imasu ga
yuwe ni
itwoma ete
mi yamapi wosame tamapa mu to

sentence.kanji: 此乃天豆日嗣之位者大命尓坐世大坐坐而
sentence.transcription: su
ko no ama tu pi tugi no kurawi pa opo mikoto ni ima se opomasimasite
wosame tamapu be si to yuduri tamapu
opo mikoto wo uke tamapari masite
kotape mawosi turaku
ware pa tapezi to inabwi mawosite
uke masa zu aru
apida ni tabi mane ku
pi kasanete
yuduri tama peba itapasi mi kasikwo mi

sentence.kanji: 詔命者受賜止白奈賀羅
sentence.transcription: kotosi no mina dukwi no towo ka amari itu ka no pi ni
opo mikoto pa uke tamapu to mawosi nagara

sentence.kanji: 事呼奈良母天地心呼労美重美畏坐左久止詔
sentence.transcription: ko no ikasi kurawi ni tugi masu
koto wo namo ame tuti no kokoro wo itapasi mi ikasi mi kasikwomi ma saku to noritamapu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: kare koko wo motite mikwo tati wo pazimete opo kimi tati omitati tukasa dukasa no pito domo no kiyo ki aka ki kokoro wo motite iya tutome ni iya simari ni ananapi maturi tasuke matura mu koto ni yorite si ko no wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto pa tapirake ku nagag ku ara mu to namo omoposi masu

sentence.transcription: kare koko wo motite
mikwo tati wo pazimete
opo kimi tati omitati tukasa dukasa no pito domo no kiyo ki aka ki
kokoro wo motite
iya tutome ni
iya simari ni ananapi maturi tasuke matura mu
koto ni yorite si
ko no wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto pa tapirake ku nagag ku ara mu to namo omoposi masu

block.header: mata ame tuti no muta naga ku topo ku aratamu masizi ki tune no nori to tate tamap yeru wosu kuni no nori mo katabuku koto na ku ugwoku koto na ku watari yuka mu to namo omoposi mye saku to noritamapu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,7@渡将去止奈母所念行左久止詔,*

sentence.transcription: mata ame tuti no muta naga ku topo ku
aratamu masizi ki
tune no nori to tate tamap yeru
wosu kuni no nori mo katabuku
koto na ku
ugwoku
koto na ku

sentence.kanji: 渡将去止奈母所念行左久止詔
sentence.transcription: watari yuka mu to namo omoposi mye saku to noritamapu
opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: topo sumyerogi no mi yo wo pazimete sumyera ga miyo miyo ama tu pitugi to taka mi kura ni imasite ko no wosu kuni ame no sita wo nade tama pi utukusibwi tamapu koto pa koto datu ni ara zu pito no oya no ono ga waku gwo wo pidasu koto no goto ku wosame tama pi utukusibwi tamapi kuru waza to namo kamu nagara omoposi mye su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,5@人祖乃意能賀弱児乎養治,*

sentence.transcription: topo sumyerogi no mi yo wo pazimete

sentence.kanji: 天皇御世御世天豆日嗣止
sentence.transcription: sumyera ga miyo miyo ama tu pitugi to
taka mi kura ni imasite

sentence.kanji: 此食国天下乎撫賜比慈賜
sentence.transcription: ko no wosu kuni ame no sita wo nade tama pi utukusibwi tamapu
koto pa koto datu ni ara zu

sentence.kanji: 人祖乃意能賀弱児乎養治
sentence.transcription: pito no oya no ono ga waku gwo wo pidasu

sentence.kanji: 事乃如久治賜比慈賜来
sentence.transcription: koto no goto ku wosame tama pi utukusibwi tamapi kuru
waza to namo
kamu nagara omoposi mye su

block.header: koko wo motite ma du ma du ame no sita no opo mi takara no upe wo utukusibwi tamap aku yurusi tamap aku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,1@先豆先豆天下公民之上乎慈賜久復賜久止詔,*

sentence.transcription: koko wo motite

sentence.kanji: 先豆先豆天下公民之上乎慈賜久復賜久止詔
sentence.transcription: ma du ma du ame no sita no opo mi takara no upe wo utukusibwi tamap aku yurusi tamap aku to noritamapu
sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu
